outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Iran threatens to block Red Sea shipping as Trump claims he's 'permanently opening' Hormuz
outlets.summary: CNN covers dual escalation — Iran's Abdollahi threatens Red Sea blockade while Trump claims permanent Hormuz control and a China weapons deal. CENTCOM says blockade 'fully implemented.' Pakistan army chief in Tehran. IMF recession warning.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: U.S. and Iran could hold new peace talks as soon as this week
outlets.summary: NBC reports on potential Round 2 talks in Pakistan while noting 6 ships turned back by blockade. Highlights tension between Trump's optimistic rhetoric and the escalating military posture.

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: Trump: 'Permanently opening' Hormuz — China agreed not to send weapons to Iran
outlets.summary: Fox Business leads with Trump's Truth Social post claiming permanent Hormuz control and China weapons deal. Frames blockade as strategic victory. Notes Round 2 talks possible 'in next two days' via Asim Munir mediation.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump fans turn on him over 'close to over' claim amid continued Hormuz blockade
outlets.summary: Mirror reports some Fox News viewers pushing back on Trump's 'close to over' assessment, noting ongoing blockade, ceasefire fragility, and no deal in sight.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Anger in Lebanon as Israel launches deadly strikes despite diplomatic drive
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera leads with Israel killing 13+ in Lebanon one day after DC talks. Also covers Iran's Red Sea shipping threat, Pakistan army chief in Tehran, and CENTCOM declaring blockade 'fully implemented.'

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Xi vows closer coordination with Russia as Iran war drags on
outlets.summary: Bloomberg covers Xi-Lavrov Beijing meeting as geopolitical realignment. Russia offering to 'compensate' China's energy shortages. Frames conflict as accelerating China-Russia axis.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Hezbollah fires 70 rockets; Netanyahu endorses Greater Israel; CENTCOM blockade 'fully implemented'
outlets.summary: Times of Israel liveblog covers 70 Hezbollah rockets at northern Israel (Nahariya targeted), Netanyahu's 'Greater Israel' i24 interview, Gofman as new Mossad chief, and CENTCOM 8-tanker blockade. IDF strikes kill 13 in Lebanon.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Six ships turned around as part of Strait of Hormuz blockade
outlets.summary: JPost leads with CENTCOM blockade enforcement details. 6 ships turned back, 2 tankers intercepted at Chabahar. Also covers Trump Round 2 hints and ceasefire expiry concerns.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Araghchi thanks Oman for principled stance on regional developments
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Araghchi's diplomatic outreach to Oman. Frames Iran as pursuing constructive diplomacy against US 'maximalism.' Also highlights Pezeshkian's blockade defiance.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran's top general warns US over 'illegal naval blockage' — threatens Red Sea, Gulf shutdown
outlets.summary: PressTV leads with Abdollahi's threat to block all shipping in Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman, and Red Sea. Frames US blockade as illegal and a ceasefire violation. Pakistan army chief Munir arrives in Tehran for mediation.
